rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Wells Fargo's Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint is moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANTS FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, AND FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant First American Trustee and First American Title Insurance Company's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege any actionable wrongdoing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Wells Fargo's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege actionable wrongdoing in light of CCC 2924, Gomes, and Fontenot. Plaintiff failed to allege tender. Additionally, Notice of Default was rescinded and no foreclosure sale is pending. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANTS FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS AND FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant First American Trustee and First American Title Insurance Company's Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint is moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANTS PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants PNMAC and MERS' Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege any actionable wrongdoing. Plaintiff also does not address bankruptcy argument in its opposition, conceding the issue. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 1. - DEFENDANTS PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: CROWDFLOWER, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ASHER INSIGHTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Application For Prelim Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 2. - PLAINTIFF CROWDFLOWER'S Hearing On Application For Preliminary Injunction. Plaintiff's Application for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. Moving party failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits and imminent irreparable harm. Plaintiff's interpretation of 39 is not plausible and alleged harm is at best speculative. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SERAFIN SAN JOSE PEREZ VS. ONE WEST BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Serafin San Jose Perez'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 15, 2013, line 3. - Plaintiff Serafin San Jose Perez's Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order. Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
